windowsScript.content:
@echo off
setlocal
mkdir "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up" 2>nul
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object],[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object],[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens_voice.wav" --scene "04"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "/assets/writing_room.png" --motion "The camera pans across the writing room, showing various scripts and papers scattered about." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "/assets/max-frustrated.png" --motion "The camera zooms in on Max's face as he slams his fist on the desk." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "/assets/writing_room.png" --motion "The writing room begins to glow and the words on the page start moving." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "04" --visual "/assets/max-and-writing_room.png" --motion "Max and the writing room engage in a lively conversation." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "4510d0d8f175719d7a9e7c6b" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/the-writing-room-wake-up_final_episode.mp4"
echo Episode build complete.
endlocal

bashScript.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object],[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object],[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "[object Object]" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens_voice.wav" --scene "04"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "/assets/writing_room.png" --motion "The camera pans across the writing room, showing various scripts and papers scattered about." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "/assets/max-frustrated.png" --motion "The camera zooms in on Max's face as he slams his fist on the desk." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "/assets/writing_room.png" --motion "The writing room begins to glow and the words on the page start moving." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "04" --visual "/assets/max-and-writing_room.png" --motion "Max and the writing room engage in a lively conversation." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "4510d0d8f175719d7a9e7c6b" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/the-writing-room-wake-up_final_episode.mp4"
echo 'Episode build complete.'

renderCommands: python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "/assets/writing_room.png" --motion "The camera pans across the writing room, showing various scripts and papers scattered about." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_01_introduction-to-the-writing-room.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "/assets/max-frustrated.png" --motion "The camera zooms in on Max's face as he slams his fist on the desk." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_02_max-s-frustration.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "/assets/writing_room.png" --motion "The writing room begins to glow and the words on the page start moving." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_03_the-writing-room-responds.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "04" --visual "/assets/max-and-writing_room.png" --motion "Max and the writing room engage in a lively conversation." --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-writing-room-wake-up/scene_04_the-plot-thickens.mp4"
executionNotes: Run voice generation first so every scene gets a concrete WAV asset.
Run the renderer second so each scene produces its own MP4 file in the job output directory.
Run the ffmpeg concat build last to assemble the final episode from the rendered scene clips.
